creator: t.m.guymer@thomasguymer.co.uk
text:
Hi,

"devel/py-pyshp" is very out of date. Version 1.2.12 was released in August 2017 (see https://github.com/GeospatialPython/pyshp/releases/tag/1.2.12 ). "graphics/py-cartopy" requires >=2 (see https://github.com/SciTools/cartopy/blob/master/requirements/default.txt ). I have an open ticket to get the FreeBSD Port dependency information of "graphics/py-cartopy" updated to reflect the true dependencies, see bug #255622. Whilst that bug is (hopefully) getting fixed it would be nice if "devel/py-pyshp" could update to the latest version on GitHub.

Thanks,

Tom
